description:
Code & test redundancy audit (2026-05-20) found ~120-150 lines of mechanical copy-paste in the core library, concentrated in the state-branch bootstrap path: the master_url clone model was added alongside the legacy worktree model and the two now carry parallel copies of seeding / symlink / git-wrapper logic instead of sharing helpers. Pure consolidation, no behaviour change. Line numbers are approximate -- audited at c262b37, and bl-c791 has since decomposed state_repo.rs into state_repo_symlinks.rs -- anchor on the symbol names and grep.

1. (High) seed vs seed_state_worktree -- near-byte-identical state-branch scaffolding. src/state_repo.rs `fn seed` and src/store_init.rs `fn seed_state_worktree` both create .balls/tasks, write the same `*.notes.jsonl merge=union` .gitattributes rule, write .gitkeep, and commit \"balls: seed state branch\". state_repo.rs's own comment admits the mirror. Extract one pub(crate) fn (e.g. seed_tasks_dir(checkout: &Path)) and call it from both.

2. (High) Symlink-materializer triplicated. ensure_tasks_symlink (src/store_init.rs) and ensure_plugins_symlink + ensure_config_symlink (src/state_repo_symlinks.rs) all implement the same idempotent \"materialize symlink at <root>/.balls/<name>, repoint if stale\" logic; they diverge only in the already-present-real-entry branch (tasks errors, plugins calls drop_placeholder_plugins_dir, config returns Ok). Extract materialize_symlink(link, target, on_real: impl FnOnce(&Path) -> Result<()>) taking a closure for that branch.

3. (Med) STATE_BRANCH = \"balls/tasks\" is declared as a separate pub(crate) const in ~5 modules (claim_push.rs, store_init.rs, state_repo.rs, remaster.rs, remaster_detach.rs) AND federate.rs has already drifted to a bare \"balls/tasks\" literal. Make one canonical const, re-import everywhere including federate.rs. The drift is the live hazard -- a rename today silently misses federate.rs.

4. (Med) next_unique_id vs next_free_id -- the same id-collision retry loop. src/task_id.rs next_unique_id and src/remaster.rs next_free_id both loop generate_id -> caller exists-predicate -> step timestamp 1ms -> cap at 1000 tries. remaster.rs's comment admits the mirror. Make next_unique_id pub(crate) and have remaster call it. Keep the &dyn Fn / impl Fn predicate shape that satisfies the tarpaulin generic-monomorphization coverage gate -- do NOT switch to a F: Fn generic.

5. (Med) Three thin git-invocation wrappers. git_state.rs's private `run` is functionally identical to git::run_git_ok (same clean_git_command spawn, same success check, same \"git {args}: {stderr}\" error string). state_repo.rs's private `run_at` is the same shape returning Result<()> via .status(). git_state already imports clean_git_command from git -- import run_git_ok too and delete its local run. NOTE: archive_recovery::git_out is a deliberate, documented best-effort Option-returning variant -- leave it alone.

6. (Low) is_symlink defined byte-identically in src/federate.rs and src/store_plugins.rs (fs::symlink_metadata(p).is_ok_and(|m| m.file_type().is_symlink())); two other sites already use std Path::is_symlink. Standardize all four on std Path::is_symlink, or lift one copy to a shared util.

Out of scope (checked, legitimately distinct): ready.rs dep_tree/TreeNode vs tree.rs forest/Node solve different problems; policy::resolve/resolve_review/resolve_close are already factored through resolve_inner. Command/plugin-layer redundancy is filed separately.

Done = the duplications above removed, make check green (cargo test all pass, clippy -D warnings clean, line-length, 100% coverage).
title: Collapse duplicated state-branch bootstrap and core-lib helpers
